name: Shrimp Etouffee
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat half the butter in a large pot; sauté onions, celery, bell peppers, garlic, and green onions until soft.
2. Add lemon juice, tomato puree, soup, mushrooms, and water; simmer for 10 minutes.
3. Sauté shrimp in remaining butter over medium heat; add to vegetables and continue simmering for 10-15 minutes.
4. Blend cornstarch with half cup of water; stir into the shrimp mixture.
5. Cook until heated through, about 10 minutes.
6. Adjust seasoning as needed; serve hot over cooked rice.
